events.title: Flat Tonic — live music at the Club
Illyria: The Pirates of Penzance — Lenches Amphitheatre
events.body: The award-winning Illyria return to the open-air stage. Performance 4pm, gates 2.30pm, with a pop-up café, ice creams and licensed bar.

events.title: Sounds of the 60s: The Nightingales — Lenches Amphitheatre
Jeeves and Wooster: Stiff Upper Lip — Lenches Amphitheatre
events.body: Alfresco Actors perform Wodehouse's comedy. Gates 1pm, performance 2.30–4.40pm.

events.title: Freedom Fields Festival
events.body: From midday at The Farm Animal Sanctuary, Evesham (runs across the weekend).

events.title: Battle of Evesham Festival — Crown & Corporation Meadow
events.body: Europe's largest 13th-century battle re-enactment, running into Saturday 1 Aug, with a talks programme including Alice Roberts and the Medieval Baebes.

events.title: Mikron Theatre: Top of the Wold — Evesham
events.body: A touring theatre company's new play celebrating community and culture.

events.title: Evesham Scarecrow Festival — Hampton Ferry
events.body: Scarecrow-making, live music, stalls and the Rotary duck race.

events.title: Murder Mystery Night: Bingo! Bonkers! — Evesham
events.body: A bingo night with a sinister twist.

eventsFootnote: Also further ahead at the Club: Cash Bingo 7 Aug, private party 15 Aug, Cash Bingo 21 Aug, Glo Quiz 22 Aug.

news.title: A standing ovation for The Handlebards
news.body: The amphitheatre's open-air As You Like It was a hit — "a spirited performance in a beautiful setting." The summer season continues with Illyria on 26 July.

news.title: Cricket club: new players welcome
news.body: Players of all ages and abilities are wanted, whether experienced, returning or brand new. Contact Venky on 07442 772470 or Charlie on 07775 660065.

news.title: Play area see-saw mended
news.body: Thanks to Dave Burns and Paul Davey, who did an excellent job repairing the broken see-saw in the play area — "better than the original," and the pre-school are delighted to have it back for September.

news.title: Summer of Heritage across Worcestershire
news.body: Wychavon's summer heritage programme is bringing history events across the county, including next month's Battle of Evesham Festival.

notices.title: Free bike marking
notices.body: Pershore Police are offering free BikeRegister anti-tamper security marking at Evesham Adventure Playground — a simple way to protect your bike.

notices.title: Patchy broadband
notices.body: A few residents have reported slow or intermittent internet this week. Worth knowing you're not alone if yours has been playing up.

notices.title: Newsletter deadline
notices.body: Got something for next week? Send it to website@thelenches.org.uk by the end of Wednesday.
